groupDefinition.name: DAP Transport Layer
groupDefinition.description: Unified protocol communication layer managing WebSocket transport, Node.js bridges, and the Debug Adapter Protocol lifecycle including error recovery.

items.title: Create `DapTransportService` Abstract Interface
items.description: Define a unified communication abstraction layer per spec [§4](system-specification.md#4-communication-architecture)
details: Define abstract class / interface `DapTransportService`
Methods: `connect()`, `disconnect()`, `sendRequest()`, `onEvent()` (Observable)
Define DAP Message base types (`DapRequest`, `DapResponse`, `DapEvent`)

items.title: Implement WebSocket Transport Layer (`WebSocketTransportService`)
items.description: Implement Web mode WebSocket communication per spec [§4.2](system-specification.md#42-web-browser-mode)
details: Implement `DapTransportService`'s WebSocket version
WebSocket connection/disconnection management
DAP message serialization/deserialization (Content-Length header + JSON body)
Use RxJS Subject to emit received events
[Test] Header parsing: Packets split by `Content-Length` handled via buffer
[Test] Sticky/half packet handling: TCP fragmented packets handled via buffer
[Test] Fail-Fast & Error Isolation: malformed packets handling
[Test] Buffer Auto-expansion: verified expansion on large payloads

items.title: DAP Session Management Service (`DapSessionService`)
items.description: Encapsulate the DAP protocol's request/response lifecycle
details: `initialize()` → Exchange Capabilities
`launch()` / `attach()` → Start debugging based on configuration
`configurationDone()` → Notify DAP Server
`disconnect()` → Terminate session
Manage request sequence ID and pending response mapping
[Test] Sequence ID management: Verify `seq` increments correctly

items.title: DAP Request Timeout Mechanism
items.description: Implement timeout mechanism for `DapSessionService` requests, preventing permanent waits when the server is unresponsive
details: Modify `sendRequest` method, add `setTimeout` wait limit (e.g., 5 seconds)
On timeout, clear pending handler and reject `Promise`
[Test] Promise Mapping: Verify `sendRequest` Promise resolves/rejects on response
[Test] Timeout mechanism: Simulate server non-response, verify timeout error

items.title: Integrate DapSessionService in DebuggerComponent
items.description: Actually invoke DapSessionService in DebuggerComponent to start and terminate debug sessions
details: Execute `initializeSession`, `launchOrAttach`, and `configurationDone` in `ngOnInit`
Call `disconnect` on `ngOnDestroy` and `goBack` to clear session and connection
Subscribe to `onEvent()` to log base events to UI in real-time
Use `try/catch` to capture timeout errors and display friendly notifications in UI (e.g., `MatSnackBar` or `dapLogs`)

items.title: Implement taro-session Core & Client
items.description: Implement the core taro-session CLI server, supporting the /session/client WebSocket channel, spawning the GDB target, and auto-saving/loading config.json and breakpoints.json
details: Implement CLI --session-path directory loading and saving
Create /session/client WebSocket channel and multiplexer
Implement GDB spawn (gdb --interpreter=dap) and stdin/stdout proxying
Load and restore config.json and breakpoints.json on GDB startup
Implement continuous auto-saving of configs and breakpoints back to the .tarodb/ directory
[Test] Verify GDB spawns correctly, GDB stdin/stdout proxy routes, and config/breakpoints restore on startup
[Doc] docs/archive/specs/node-js-websocket-bridge.md

items.title: Connection Error Handling
items.description: Implement connection error handling mechanism per spec [§7.1](system-specification.md#71-connection-error-handling)
details: Connection timeout → `MatDialog` error dialog + retry button
Connection lost → Status indicator update + console output of reason
When in error state, restart button transforms into reconnect button
Disconnect detection optimization → Fix WebSocket `onerror` / `onclose` signal routing to `DapSessionService` data flow lifecycle
[Test] Connection timeout auto-catch and disconnect auto-reaction integration

items.title: DAP Server Error Handling
items.description: Handle DAP Server errors per spec [§7.2](system-specification.md#72-dap-server-error-handling)
details: Unexpected process termination → Console log
Invalid DAP response → Log to console, ignore the message
DAP error response → Display error message to user

items.title: DAP 'terminated' Event _restart Payload Passing
items.description: Support context-aware session restart by forwarding the custom _restart field.
details: Update the DapSessionService to capture the _restart field
Ensure disconnect() cycle cleans up stale RxJS subscriptions
Modify startSession() initialization sequence to accept and merge this cached _restart data

items.title: Extract DAP Core Library
items.description: Refactor DAP session, transport, and API types into a standalone Angular library.
details: Define @taro/dap-core library structure
Migrate dap.types.ts to library
Migrate transport layer services
Migrate session layer services
Update app to consume labels
[Test] Verify connection and session lifecycle tests pass

items.title: Lib: Initialize & Extract API Types
items.description: Create @taro/dap-core library and migrate global DAP type definitions.
details: Generate library project projects/dap-core
Relocate dap.types.ts to library
Update app imports to use type-only workspace paths
[Test] Verify build-success for library and application

items.title: Lib: Extract Transport Layer
items.description: Migrate transport services and factory to @taro/dap-core.
details: Migrate abstract transport and implementations (WS/IPC)
Configure library providers for DI abstraction
Update main app to provide transport via library tokens
[Test] Verify WebSocket connection handshake in dev mode

items.title: Lib: Extract Session Manager
items.description: Relocate DapSessionService state machine to @taro/dap-core.
details: Migrate DapSessionService and DapConfigService to @taro/dap-core
Update dap-core.provider.ts and public-api.ts
Update app imports to use @taro/dap-core
Link: docs/archive/specs/WI-61-implementation-plan.md
[Test] Verify stepping and state transitions in active debug session

items.title: Lib: Final Integration & Cleanup
items.description: Perform final refactoring, documentation updates, and UI-layer optimization.
details: Update file-map.md and architecture documentation
Remove deprecated local service copies from app/
Run full regression suite on UI+Library integration
[Test] Verify 0 lint errors and all unit tests pass (app+lib)

items.title: Standardize Capability-Aware Stop and Restart Logic
items.description: Implement hierarchical fallback for session termination and native restart support.
details: [DAP] Implement stop() with terminate/disconnect fallback in DapSessionService
[DAP] Implement restart() with native/soft fallback in DapSessionService
[UI] Update DebugControlGroup to support Run action from idle state
[Test] Verify capability-aware fallback logic in session service
[Doc] docs/architecture/session-layer.md

items.title: Merge terminated and idle execution states
items.description: Simplify the ExecutionState machine by merging 'terminated' into 'idle' to improve session cleanup reliability.
details: Refactor ExecutionState type to remove 'terminated'
Update DapSessionService to call reset() on terminated/exited events
Implement private isDisconnecting flag in DapSessionService
Remove redundant isTerminated$ checks from UI components
Update session-layer.md architecture diagram
[Test] Verify transport is closed and data is cleared after program exit
[Doc] docs/archive/specs/merge-execution-states.md

items.title: Refactor DapSessionService Encapsulation
items.description: Make sendRequest private and expose high-level methods for loadedSources and source.
details: Add loadedSources() and source() methods to DapSessionService
Make sendRequest() private
Update DapFileTreeService to use high-level methods
Update affected unit tests
[Test] Verify File Tree still loads correctly with new methods
[Doc] docs/archive/specs/refactor-dap-encapsulation.md

items.title: Encapsulate DapSessionService Reset Logic
items.description: Change the reset() method to private
details: 1. Modify DapSessionService.reset() access modifier to private. 2. Verify that all internal calls are still functional. 3. Update stop() and disconnect() to handle error recovery. 4. [Test] Verify recovery from error state via stop() and disconnect().

items.title: DapSessionManager Core Implementation
items.description: Refactor session handling to support multiple concurrent DAP sessions
details: Implement DapSessionManager to track multiple DapSessionService instances
Add SessionID to all protocol messages
Manage transport lifecycle per session
[Test] Verify multiple sessions can be started and tracked independently
[Doc] docs/archive/specs/WI-94-session-manager.md

items.title: Stop at Main via DAP Function Breakpoints
items.description: Standardize 'stop at main' behavior across all DAP adapters using explicit function breakpoints during initialization.
details: Update DapConfig to include stopOnEntry
Implement setFunctionBreakpoints in DapSessionService
Auto-set main breakpoint during startup
Expose stopOnEntry toggle in Setup UI
Merge docs/architecture relate files with docs/archive/specs/stop-at-main.md
[Test] Verify stop on main with gdb/lldb-dap
[Doc] docs/archive/specs/stop-at-main.md

items.title: Implement execution-scoped stackTrace cache and request coalescing in DapSessionService
items.description: Optimize DAP stackTrace communication by coalescing concurrent in-flight requests and introducing an execution-scoped transient cache cleared on stepping or resumption.
details: Implement transient stackTrace cache via ThreadObjects (DapThreadSession)
Restrict DapSessionService to exclusively expose DapThreadSession[] via threads$
Coalesce parallel concurrent stackTrace calls in DapThreadSession into a single active GDB request
Implement temporal buffering (50ms) in DapSessionService to debounce high-frequency started/exited thread events
Refactor DebuggerComponent and ThreadCallStackComponent to consume stackTrace via thread objects
[Test] Verify concurrent stackTrace calls on a thread object only trigger 1 adapter request
[Test] Verify 20 high-frequency thread events are debounced into 1 threads$ stream update
[Doc] docs/archive/specs/dap-stacktrace-cache.md

items.title: Implement taro-session Chat Routing & Log Persistence
items.description: Implement the real-time chat sub-protocol, /session/agent WebSocket routing, event broadcasting, and continuous log file persistence inside the logs/ directory
details: Implement /session/agent socket connection and validation
Implement real-time logical user-agent chat message routing
Broadcast GDB DAP events to both Client and Agent sockets concurrently
Implement continuous real-time logging to logs/stdout.log, logs/stderr.log, and logs/dap.log
[Test] Verify GDB events are broadcasted, chat messages route correctly, and logs are persisted to disk
[Doc] docs/architecture/agentic-debug-architecture.md

items.title: Implement taro-session Agent Memory & MCP Host
items.description: Implement the MCP server in taro-session supporting file inspection, SMT solver tool-calling, and cognitive memory.md reading/writing
details: Implement the Model Context Protocol (MCP) host server on the /session/agent channel
Implement read_workspace_file, get_build_errors, and run_local_test MCP tools
Implement the solve_memory_corruption MCP tool interfacing with SMT-lib solvers (e.g. Z3)
Implement write_agent_memory and read_agent_memory MCP tools to persist and load memory.md
[Test] Verify MCP tools solve memory constraints, read files, and write cognitive memory.md
[Doc] docs/architecture/agentic-debug-architecture.md

items.title: Implement AI Companion Integration & Cognitive Loop
items.description: Implement the standalone Agentic AI Companion client process that loads AGENTS.md and MEMORY.md, connects to ws://localhost:8080/session/agent, and performs conversational debugging and tool-calling
details: Implement standalone cognitive Agentic AI Companion client script
Implement loading and bootstrapping of personas from AGENTS.md
Connect client to ws://localhost:8080/session/agent and handle logical event streams
Implement LLM-driven active GDB DAP tool-calling (stackTrace, variables queries)
Implement cognitive reasoning loop using MCP solver constraints & memory updates
[Test] Verify companion connects, performs active GDB tool-calling, and updates memory.md via taro-session
[Doc] docs/architecture/agentic-debug-architecture.md

items.title: Implement taro-session Connection State Machine & Setup Handshake
items.description: Introduce a formal connection state machine in taro-session and taro-debugger. Client performs setup handshake before standard DAP initialization.
details: Add connection state machine and setup command handler to server.ts
Enforce launch parameter validation
Guard agent socket connection
Update frontend config and forms with sessionPath
Update startSession to perform setup handshake and populate config
Update docs/architecture and filemap with docs/archive/specs/setup-handshake-protocol.md
Provide a narrative link in docs/architecture.md mapping the websocket bridge setup phase to the setup handshake protocol spec
[Doc] docs/archive/specs/setup-handshake-protocol.md
[Test] Verify state gating and connection rejection

items.title: Implement taro-session Unit Testing Suite
items.description: Establish the unit testing framework for taro-session and implement tests to verify WebSocket server routing, GDB event broadcasting, and logger file persistence
details: Configure test runner for taro-session
[Test] Verify server rejects unauthorized /session/agent connections
[Test] Verify GDB events are broadcasted to client and agent concurrently
[Test] Verify SessionLogger writes to stdout.log, stderr.log, and dap.log
[Doc] docs/archive/specs/taro-session-unit-testing.md

items.title: Validate Session Directory Existence in setup open-session Handshake
items.description: Reject open-session setup command in taro-session if the target session path does not exist or is not a directory.
details: Validate that arguments.sessionPath exists and is a directory during 'open-session' setup command
[Test] Verify open-session command fails with session-failed if directory does not exist
[Test] Verify frontend shows error dialog for non-existent session directory

items.title: DapSessionService Quick Wins: Deduplication, Guards & Typing
items.description: Eliminate code duplication in step commands, add missing state guards, type the capabilities bag, restrict sendRequest visibility, and fix default timeout.
details: Extract a generic `executeStepCommand(command, allThreadsContinued, extraArgs?)` method to eliminate ~140 lines of duplicated boilerplate across continue/next/stepIn/stepOut/nextInstruction/stepInInstruction
Add `assertState(['stopped'])` guard to all step methods (next, stepIn, stepOut, nextInstruction, stepInInstruction) for consistency with continue()
Change `sendRequest` visibility from `public` to a restricted access pattern to prevent bypassing state guards
Define a typed `DapCapabilities` interface in `dap.types.ts` and replace `capabilities: any` with `capabilities: DapCapabilities`
Remove orphaned JSDoc block at L161-168 and fix default timeout from 500000ms to 5000ms in sendRequest
[Test] Verify all step commands reject with DapFatalException when not in 'stopped' state
[Test] Verify sendRequest is no longer callable from external consumers
[Doc] docs/archive/specs/dap-session-refactor.md

items.title: Extract DapBreakpointManager & DapThreadManager
items.description: Decompose DapSessionService Phase 1: extract breakpoint and thread management into dedicated services to reduce God Object scope.
details: Extract `DapBreakpointManager` service to own all breakpoint state (breakpointsMap, breakpointFileState, systemBreakpointIds) and public breakpoint APIs (setBreakpoints, toggleBreakpoint, toggleBreakpointEnabled, removeBreakpoint, resyncAllBreakpointsInternal, setFunctionBreakpoints)
Extract `DapThreadManager` service to own thread lifecycle (threadObjects, threadEventsBuffer, flush logic, active thread tracking)
Refactor `handleTransportEvent` switch cases into dedicated handler methods delegating to the new sub-managers
DapSessionService retains orchestration role and delegates to the extracted managers
[Test] Existing dap-session.service.spec.ts must pass after extraction with updated DI setup
[Test] Add unit tests for DapBreakpointManager in isolation
[Test] Add unit tests for DapThreadManager in isolation
[Doc] docs/archive/specs/dap-session-refactor.md

items.title: Extract DapRequestBroker & DapRequestSender Interface
items.description: Decompose DapSessionService Phase 2: extract request/response bookkeeping into DapRequestBroker and break circular DapThreadSession dependency via interface.
details: Extract `DapRequestBroker` service to own seq counter, pendingRequests map, timeout logic, and raw sendRequest
Define `DapRequestSender` interface with narrow API surface (sendRequest, executionState) for DapThreadSession dependency injection
Refactor DapThreadSession constructor to accept `DapRequestSender` interface instead of full DapSessionService reference
DapSessionService delegates all request/response bookkeeping to the broker
[Test] DapThreadSession unit tests using a mock DapRequestSender
[Test] DapRequestBroker unit tests in isolation
[Doc] docs/archive/specs/dap-session-refactor.md

items.title: Extract DapExecutionController & DapSessionLifecycle Facade
items.description: Decompose DapSessionService Phase 3: extract execution control and session lifecycle into final sub-services, reducing DapSessionService to a thin facade.
details: Extract `DapExecutionController` service to own all execution control methods (continue, next, stepIn, stepOut, pause, instruction-level variants) and the commandInFlight state
Extract `DapSessionLifecycle` service to own connectTransport, initializeSession, startSession, stop, restart, disconnect, and the executionState state machine
DapSessionService becomes a thin facade (~200 lines) delegating to all extracted sub-services
Refactor DapMessageRouter logic to dispatch events to the correct sub-manager
[Test] Full integration test verifying the facade correctly delegates to all sub-services
[Test] DapExecutionController unit tests with mocked broker
[Test] DapSessionLifecycle unit tests for state transitions
[Doc] docs/archive/specs/dap-session-refactor.md
